steps.title: Use the observation clue
steps.content: The first sentence says handedness is easy to observe in humans. The next sentence says the trait is present but less blank in many animals, so researchers use special tasks to reveal it. The blank must mean less apparent or identifiable.

steps.title: Reject unrelated meanings
steps.content: B concerns how fascinating the trait is, C concerns how important it is, and D concerns usefulness. None explains why researchers need special tasks to detect handedness in animals. The word that means apparent or identifiable fits. The answer is A.
